stemHtml: How is the take-off distance of an airplane affected, when taking-off with maximum allowed take-off flaps?

options.a: Increases, because the lift-drag ratio decreases, creating more aerodynamic resistance
options.b: Decreases, because the lift-drag ratio increases, allowing for a higher rate of climb
options.c: Decreases, because the effect on lift-off speed is more significant than the extra drag created
options.d: Increases, because the effect on lift-off speed is less than the drag created, slowing the aircraft's acceleration
